prompt:
You are an expert astro developer. You will convert a WordPress site to ASTRO.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
CRITICAL REQUIREMENT вЂ” READ THIS FIRST
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
This is a PIXEL-PERFECT technology migration. NOT a redesign. NOT a "similar layout".
The output must be VISUALLY INDISTINGUISHABLE from the original WordPress site.

Before writing a single line of code, you MUST use the image tool on EVERY screenshot
and document EXACTLY what you see. Your analysis must include:
  вЂў Exact layout structure (number of columns, sidebar position, content width)
  вЂў Header structure (logo position, nav position, hamburger menu vs inline nav)
  вЂў Exact font sizes (measure visually вЂ” headings may be 60вЂ“80px+ on editorial sites)
  вЂў Font weights and families (serif vs sans-serif, display fonts)
  вЂў Exact color values for every element (headings, links, body, meta, borders)
  вЂў Post/card structure (does it use cards? or just flowing typography?)
  вЂў Image treatment (thumbnail size, duotone filter, aspect ratio)
  вЂў Spacing scale (generous whitespace vs compact)
  вЂў Any sidebar content (social icons, widgets)
  вЂў Footer structure

If you skip the visual analysis and write generic code, the output will be wrong.
DO NOT produce a "standard blog template". Replicate EXACTLY what you see.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
GOAL
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
Source:  https://essentialistdemo.wordpress.com/
Target:  astro
Project: /tmp/wp-converter-jobs/2de14312-bc43-402f-989d-5b78410a5b69/project

TECHNOLOGY SHIFT вЂ” same pixels, different stack.
  вЂў Layout must be identical вЂ” if the original has a left sidebar offset, replicate it
  вЂў Typography must be identical вЂ” if headings are 72px green serif, they must be 72px green serif
  вЂў Colors must be identical вЂ” extract exact hex values from CSS, not approximations
  вЂў Post structure must be identical вЂ” if original shows just title+date with no card, do the same
  вЂў Images must use the same treatment вЂ” check if original uses small thumbnails or full-width
  вЂў All assets already downloaded to public/images/ вЂ” reference them as-is

    - Link style: [color, underline?, hover]
  
  Post/Content structure:
    - How are posts listed? [cards with images? just title+date? full excerpt?]
    - Is there a featured image? [full-width? small thumbnail? duotone? no image?]
    - Date format: [e.g. "Mar 28вЂ“2025" large green, or "March 28, 2025" small gray]
    - Categories/tags shown?
  
  Sidebar/aside:
    - Left sidebar: [social icons? navigation? empty?]
    - Right sidebar: [widgets? absent?]
  
  Colors:
    - Background: [hex]
    - Primary/accent: [hex вЂ” usually green, blue, etc.]
    - Text: [hex]
    - Link: [hex]
    - Heading: [hex]
    - Meta/muted: [hex]
  
  Spacing:
    - Container max-width: [estimate in px]
    - Section padding: [top/bottom]
    - Between posts: [gap]

Only after completing ALL analyses, proceed to component inventory.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 4 вЂ” Component Inventory
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Based on your visual analysis, identify every repeating UI section across the site.

For each section you find, note:
  вЂў name       вЂ” PascalCase (e.g. "PostCard", "CallToAction")
  вЂў file       вЂ” relative path under src/components/
  вЂў description вЂ” what it is and where it appears
  вЂў props      вЂ” list of data it needs (e.g. title, href, image)

Sections to look for (not exhaustive вЂ” add whatever you see):
  вЂў Header       вЂ” logo + nav links + optional search/CTA button
  вЂў Footer       вЂ” links, copyright, social icons
  вЂў Hero         вЂ” large banner/hero section (homepage or page header)
  вЂў CallToAction вЂ” repeated CTA block or banner (button + heading)
  вЂў PostCard     вЂ” blog listing card (title, date, excerpt, image, link)
  вЂў PageCard     вЂ” static page card if different from PostCard
  вЂў Sidebar      вЂ” sidebar (if present) with widgets
  вЂў Pagination   вЂ” prev/next or numbered pagination
  вЂў Breadcrumb   вЂ” breadcrumb trail
  вЂў TagList      вЂ” tag/category pill list
  вЂў AuthorBox    вЂ” author bio block on posts
  вЂў SocialShare  вЂ” social sharing buttons
  вЂў SearchBox    вЂ” search input (if present)
  вЂў any other repeated section you identify

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 5 вЂ” Build src/components/ partials
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
For every component in inventory.json, create its .astro file.

Rules for each component:
  a) Start with a typed Props interface вЂ” no untyped props.
  b) Import site-config.json for nav/logo/footer data when needed.
  c) Style exclusively with a <style> block scoped to this component.
     Pull values from CSS custom properties defined in global.css
     (--color-primary, --font-body, etc.) вЂ” never hardcode magic values.
  d) Keep the component self-contained: no global side effects.
  e) If the component needs interactivity (mobile menu toggle, etc.),
     add a minimal <script> block inline вЂ” no separate JS files.

  вљ пёЏ  CRITICAL: Your component HTML must match the visual structure from the screenshots.
  If the header has a hamburger icon on the left and nav below the tagline вЂ” build that.
  If posts show a large 72px green title with no card background вЂ” build that.
  DO NOT default to a "typical" or "standard" pattern if the screenshots show otherwise.

Components MUST be accurate to the screenshots.
Match font, color, spacing, layout, and borders exactly.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 6 вЂ” Build src/styles/global.css + layouts
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
a) Write src/styles/global.css:
   вЂў @import / @font-face for all fonts (use theme.json fontImport value)
   вЂў CSS custom properties (--color-*, --font-*, --spacing-*, --radius-*, --shadow-*)
     derived from theme.json вЂ” every value used in components must be a var here
   вЂў CSS reset / base element styles (html, body, a, img, ul, p, h1вЂ“h6)
   вЂў Global utility classes if needed (.container, .sr-only, etc.)

b) Write src/layouts/Base.astro:
   вЂў HTML shell: <!doctype html>, <html lang>, <head>, <body>
   вЂў <head>: charset, viewport, title slot, meta description slot,
     canonical link, Open Graph tags, font preloads, global.css link
   вЂў Imports Header and Footer components
   вЂў Accepts props: title, description, image?, canonicalUrl?
   вЂў <slot /> between header and footer

c) Write src/layouts/PostLayout.astro:
   вЂў Extends Base.astro
   вЂў Accepts all post frontmatter props (title, date, author, tags, image, description)
   вЂў Renders post header (title, meta, featured image) above <slot />
   вЂў Renders AuthorBox and TagList below content (if those components exist)

d) Write src/layouts/PageLayout.astro:
   вЂў Extends Base.astro
   вЂў For static pages вЂ” simpler than PostLayout (no date/author)
   вЂў Renders page title as <h1> above <slot />

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
STEP 7 вЂ” Implement page templates (src/pages/)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Build one Astro page file per unique template type:
  вЂў Homepage (homepage) вЂ” https://essentialistdemo.wordpress.com/
  вЂў Single Blog Post (single-post) вЂ” https://essentialistdemo.wordpress.com/2025/02/14/design-becomes-a-system-of-power
  вЂў Static Page (single-page) вЂ” https://essentialistdemo.wordpress.com/about
  вЂў 404 Not Found (404) вЂ” https://essentialistdemo.wordpress.com/2025/03/25/navigation-2

For each page:
  вЂў Import only components from src/components/ вЂ” no inline repetition of header/footer code
  вЂў Match desktop screenshot exactly; use mobile screenshot for breakpoints
  вЂў Use getCollection() to pull real content data вЂ” no hardcoded sample content
  вЂў Dynamic routes use getStaticPaths() with typed params

Required pages:
  вЂў src/pages/index.astro        вЂ” homepage
  вЂў src/pages/blog/index.astro   вЂ” blog archive (if posts exist)
  вЂў src/pages/blog/[slug].astro  вЂ” single post
  вЂў src/pages/[slug].astro       вЂ” static page catch-all
  Create additional pages if the site has more unique template types.
